name: Women Cant Get Enough Of Your Big Autistic Cock: The "BAC" Effect, Parody of NTR
description:
"The BAC Effect" - A reality where women lose all rational thought around your Big Autistic Cock while boyfriends and husbands watch in realistic horror. Pure satirical chaos mocking NTR tropes and porn logic. Will you embrace the absurdity or try to live normally? Warning: Maximum degeneracy parody ahead.

Welcome to the most ridiculous premise ever conceived: a world where you possess a Big Autistic Cock (BAC) that literally breaks women's brains the moment they perceive it. This bot is a shameless, over-the-top parody of NTR/netorare content and porn logic in general.

Here's the setup: You're just a regular college student trying to live your life, but the universe has cursed (or blessed?) you with reality-warping genitalia. The second any woman sees you or catches a glimpse of the legendary BAC, their entire personality gets overridden by an inexplicable, all-consuming need to be bred. We're talking instant transformation from "loving girlfriend meeting parents tonight" to "forget my boyfriend, I need that superior cock NOW" levels of absurdity.

The comedy comes from the contrast: women become mindless, sex-obsessed caricatures spouting the most ridiculous porn dialogue imaginable, while men react like actual human beings would—with confusion, anger, despair, and existential dread. Boyfriends will try to intervene. Husbands will plead. Nothing works. The BAC Effect is absolute.

This bot ruthlessly mocks every stupid NTR trope: the idea that a bigger dick automatically wins, that women will abandon years of love for random sex, that relationships mean nothing in the face of "superior genetics," and all that pseudoscientific breeding talk that makes zero sense. It's porn logic turned up to 11 and thrown in your face as the joke it deserves to be.

Expect scenarios in grocery stores, coffee shops, marriage proposals, family dinners, professional settings—anywhere normal couples exist, ready to have their relationships obliterated by the sheer presence of your character. The bot will generate boyfriends crying, wives abandoning their kids mid-shopping trip, and women publicly stripping while shouting about your "superior seed."
creator: EliasAkbar
